description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that triggers on workflow dispatch, push, and pull requests. The workflow has two jobs: build_gcc on ubuntu-22.04 and formatting-check on ubuntu-latest. The build_gcc job checks out the repository, installs system and Python libraries, and builds several C++ projects including FunctionalPlus, Eigen, json, and doctest. It then builds and tests a C++ project with unit tests and stateful tests. The formatting-check job checks out the repository and uses the clang-format-lint-action to verify code formatting.
